child.code:
// The skeleton every screen_spec.json starts from. Each top-level key
// is either required (type / version / metadata / structure) or optional.
{
  "type":            "screen_spec",
  "version":         "1.0",
  "metadata":        { /* name, displayName, platforms, layoutFile, … */ },
  "structure":       { /* components, layout, collection, tabView, …     */ },
  "stateManagement": { /* states, uiVariables, eventHandlers, displayLogic */ },
  "dataFlow":        { /* diagram, viewModel, customTypes, repositories, … */ },
  "userActions":     [ /* what the user taps and what the VM does about it */ ],
  "validation":      { /* clientSide / serverSide rules                    */ },
  "transitions":     [ /* onNavigate(url) → destinations                   */ ],
  "relatedFiles":    [ /* Layout / ViewModel / View / Model paths          */ ],
  "notes":           [ /* anything a reviewer needs to know next           */ ]
}
